nodes.label: Historico e Soft Deletes Integration Guide
nodes.norm_label: historico e soft deletes integration guide

nodes.label: Supabase
nodes.rationale: Supabase owns the existing database triggers and audit behavior, so the Nuxt app only needs to read and update data correctly.

nodes.label: Soft Delete Pattern
nodes.rationale: The guide instructs Nuxt to filter deleted records and update deletion metadata instead of physically deleting rows, preserving audit history.

nodes.label: History Timeline UI
nodes.rationale: The timeline component formats historical changes so users can see edit authors, timestamps, and field-level differences.

nodes.label: valorTotal and descontoTotal Recalculation
nodes.rationale: The guide recommends recalculating totals reactively before the update reaches the backend trigger, keeping the screen in sync with edited products.

nodes.label: Invisible Supabase Audit
nodes.rationale: The document states the Nuxt app does not need to create audit structures because the existing Supabase trigger handles auditing invisibly.

nodes.label: Profiles Table and Associated Triggers Document
nodes.norm_label: profiles table and associated triggers document

nodes.label: Profile deleted_at and deleted_by Fields
nodes.rationale: The profiles table carries soft-delete metadata so profile records can be marked deleted without being physically removed.

nodes.label: Profile updated_at and updated_by Fields
nodes.rationale: The table includes update metadata to support consistent profile audit tracking.

nodes.label: Automatic Profile Creation
nodes.rationale: A Supabase Authentication insert should automatically create a matching public.profiles row, seed the initial email, and prepare permissions.

nodes.label: Profile Audit Consistency
nodes.rationale: The update trigger injects now() into updated_at before profile edits are saved so audit timestamps stay consistent.

nodes.label: Crawling Allowed
nodes.rationale: The file applies to all user agents and leaves Disallow empty, which permits crawling.

nodes.label: SVG role img aria-label Notas Zincao
